label: Basic Bayesian observer
core_mechanism: Multiplies likelihood and prior, then reads out a posterior

label: Original condition-dependent Switching observer
core_mechanism: Chooses prior or sensory report from relative precision

label: Serial stimulus + response baseline
core_mechanism: Independent mixture plus both attraction terms

label: Static Hidden Markov Switching Observer
core_mechanism: Three emissions connected by one transition matrix

label: Covariate-dependent HMM
core_mechanism: Transition probabilities vary with current and previous-trial variables
fitting_method: EM plus regularized multinomial transition M-step

label: Subject-level static HMM
core_mechanism: One separately fitted static HMM per participant
